mapper.select: select pm.id, pm.src_user_id as srcUserId, pm.tar_user_id as tarUserId, pm.content, pm.img, pm.msg_time as time, pm.is_read as status, u.username, u.another_name as anotherName, u.picture from private_msg pm left join user u on u.id = pm.src_user_id where pm.tar_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_deleted = 0 order by pm.msg_time desc limit #{index}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) from private_msg pm where pm.tar_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_deleted = 0

select pm.id, pm.src_user_id as srcUserId, pm.tar_user_id as tarUserId, pm.content, pm.img, pm.msg_time as time, pm.is_read as status, su.username as srcUsername, su.another_name as srcAnotherName, su.picture as srcPicture, tu.username as tarUsername, tu.another_name as tarAnotherName, tu.picture as tarPicture from private_msg pm left join user su on su.id = pm.src_user_id left join user tu on tu.id = pm.tar_user_id where ( pm.src_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_user_id = #{peerId} and pm.src_deleted = 0 ) or ( pm.src_user_id = #{peerId} and pm.tar_user_id = #{userId} and pm.tar_deleted = 0 ) order by pm.msg_time asc limit 200
mapper.insert: insert into private_msg ( src_user_id, tar_user_id, content, img, msg_time, is_read, src_deleted, tar_deleted ) values ( #{srcUserId}, #{tarUserId}, #{content}, #{img}, #{time}, 0, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: update private_msg set is_read = 1 where tar_user_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0 and tar_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from private_msg where tar_user_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0 and tar_deleted = 0
